# MoCHII element rate data: CL (Z=17, 5 stages, highest terminal)
# PHOTO: E_th[eV] E0 sigma0[Mb] ya P yw y0 y1 (VFKY96 outer shell, phfit2.f PH2)
# CI: dE[eV] P A X K (Voronov 1997, cfit.f)
# RR: A B T0 T1 C T2 (Badnell 2006, CHIANTI v11.0.2 .rrparams of the recombining ion)
# DR: n, c_i [cm^3 s^-1 K^1.5], E_i [K] (Badnell group, CHIANTI .drparams; n=0 if absent)
# DR2: A B T0 T1 (Shull & Van Steenberg 1982 form, alpha = A T^-3/2 e^-T0/T (1 + B e^-T1/T))
# RR2: A eta (power law alpha = A (T/1e4)^-eta; CHIANTI rrparams type 3)
# CXI/CXR: form, 6 coefficients (charge exchange with H+ / H0; Huang et al. 2023 Table 4 transcription;
#   forms: 0 none; 1 a(T/300)^b exp(-c/T4); 2 aT4^b + cT4^d; 3 (aT4^b + cT4^d)exp(-e/T);
#   4 exp(sum c_k lnT^k); 5 form4*exp(-c6/T4))
# generated by tools/fitting/make_element_data.py on 2026-07-11
